description_long: This is a small, single-story house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The front facade features a central entryway with a small set of steps, a covered porch with a fabric awning, and two symmetrical windows on either side. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal siding with a beige and black geometric pattern, and there are several plants or shrubs flanking the entrance. The rear of the house has two windows and a large blank section, while one side features three closely spaced windows and the other side is mostly solid with minimal fenestration. The roof is flat and open, revealing some interior partitioning and furniture, suggesting a compact, functional layout. The overall design is simple and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on clean lines.
description: A compact, single-story house with a flat roof, geometric siding, and a central entryway flanked by windows and plants. The design is modern and minimal, with a small porch and simple window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a fabric awning, two windows, and plants on either side.
description_view_1: Side view with three large windows in a row and some greenery at the base, minimal architectural detail.
description_view_2: Rear view with two windows and a large blank wall section, simple and unadorned.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mostly solid wall with minimal window openings and some visible greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, grouped on side, sparse on rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, small porch, fabric awning, and flanking plants
